descriptions.text: Jungle Emperor is a cancelled 1990 platform action tie-in game that was in development by Taito for the Famicom, based on the 1989 anime series Jungle Emperor (The New Adventures of Kimba the White Lion) by Osamu Tezuka. Not much is known about this game, except that it was going to be released in November 1990, but it was cancelled for unknown reasons. No prototypes of the game are known to exist.
